title: elymus distichus
intro: Elymus distichus, also known as two-flowered wheat grass, is a perennial grass species native to North America. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial activities. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, sore throats, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Elymus distichus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to create topical creams and salves.
